name: Campbell's Paprika Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt the butter and brown the chicken for 10 minutes or until browned. Remove; set aside.
Spoon off any excess fat.
2. In the same skillet, combine the soup, paprika, and ground red pepper. Heat to boiling.
Return the chicken to the skillet. Cover and cook over low heat for 5 minutes or
until the chicken is no longer pink, stirring often.
3. Stir in the sour cream. Heat through.
Serve over noodles.
